case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. A-RED TRANSPORTATION, INC., et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES ONE THROUGH TEN INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION OF ERNEST KNOWLES FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT A-RED TRANSPORTATION, INC. KARASIK, EDWARD $59,985.67 PRINCIPAL, $2,500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $2,464.50 INTEREST, $405.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $65,355.17, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-26-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-04-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: K. Shaw, CSR: Vicki Gross.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bank of the West, present, was sworn and examined.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant(s): A-Red Transportation, Inc. and Edward Karasik as follows:
Damages/Principal $59,985.67
Prejudgment Interest $2,464.50
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $405.00,
Total judgment amount of $65,355.17
(See scanned document for further details).

Judgment signed in open court.
